transcript.text:
[Hanwoo (Korean Premium Beef & Pork) ASMR]
There's no need for words
Hello everyone
I'm at Bangbae-dong which is nearby my restaurant
There's a restaurant here that's been here for 40 years
that sell special cuts of beef
And the locals love it, so I'm here
My mouth is already watering thinking about beef
Over here!
Myungrang restaurant
[Myungrang Restaurant] [Seoul, Seocho-gu]
Hello~
What should I eat?
Chuck flap tail,
That one's my favorite!
-Is that your favorite? -Yes

-It just got delivered just now -Really?
Beef 2+ grade
Are there other items that are not on the menu?
-I saw some other items on a blog -We do
-Jjapaguri? -Yes
Jjapaghetti would taste so good with beef
Well then 5 servings of chuck flap tail,
5 servings of special cuts,
2 servings of brisket,
1 pork jowl, 1 pork skirt, 1 pork belly,
[Laughs]
She is out of her mind right now Here, write that down
It's because we're old
I'm 76 years old
You don't look 76!
I saw you on TV once

I almost fainted
There's no way a human can do that
I made a bet with a friend
[Can't believe it]
[Side dishes] Thank you
Kimchi That looks good
-What's this? -Salted clam
[And other complimentary side dishes]
They don't have the meats cut in advance
All cut on order
So that the meat is tasty
[Hanwoo (Korean premium beef 2+ grade) marblings]
[All ready to go]
[10 servings total] [KBBQ Party]
Thank you Wow, looks good
What are these?

Hanger steak, beef skirt, neck chain
-That's the pork skirt, right? -Yes
Pork belly below it
What do I start with?
Greasy parts first?
Non-greasy first
The neck chain is not greasy and has a chewy consistency just like the outside skirt
Let's start with that first
On the grill
Not yet
Spiced scallop
Delicious
Salted clams are good too I almost finished it even if it's salty
Let's eat the neck chain first
Looks tasty!
Hanger steak too These are great too

All the non-greasy cuts first
What's this? It looks so good It's completely red
The colors are amazing
I love how quickly beef cooks
I like it rare
Beef skirt
Dip a little bit of salt
Really savory
I love the scent
Take these out
Put 1 spiced scallop on top
This is just too good
What's this? Let's dip it in here
Skirt!
Cook the skirt meat
Its marbling is incredible

That's amazing
Some hanger steak
The meat juice is dripping
So good
Chewy texture, but tender
This is the salted clam
Put that on top
This is delicious
Skirt meat
Soft!
No need for words
Spiced scallions on here
A couple of briskets
The marblings are not like briskets
It cooks really fast!
This didn't even take 10 seconds to cook

These are some great meat
A good brisket has a crunchy texture
The fat was just like that
How well is this cooked?
I cooked it too much
It's supposed to be rare
I'll do it right next time
You know what I was going to save this for later, but I can't
Not cooked yet
This one should be good to go
Is it even allowed to be this tasty?
[Just laugh]
Extraordinary human being
Some meat
As I cook the hanger meat
Chuck flap tail Looks tasty!

Spiced scallop on top
Wrap it
Some salted clams too
Can I have more salted clams, please
With kimchi on top now Their kimchi looks exceptional
Thank you
Cooked well
The texture is out of this world
Check out the marbling on this brisket
It's insane!
Let's cook half of the chuck flap tail
I'll eat the other half with noodles
About this much
Last part of the chuck flap
Now for the brisket
Looks so good

This is honestly too good
Pork skirt on the side
Cook some kimchi on here
I thought the pork skirt was seagull meat when I was younger (because of the way it's named in Korean)
Pork belly
Let's cook both
Pork jowl
I've never had a piece like this
What's this?
So big
Let's try the pork skirt first
Was it always this tender?
Some kimchi this time
I'm losing focus It's so good
Let's make a lettuce wrap
Ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)

I'm going to eat that with Jjapaghetti noodles I'm looking forward to it
All cooked
Cut it against the grain
Where's all of that going to?
It feels like I got robbed
The owner said the pork belly and pork jowl are delicious
Let's try it
Wow
Pork belly now
How's the texture like this?
So good
I ordered Jjapaghetti noodles
Looks good!
Jjapaghetti
Mix it up
Put about 1, 2, 3

4 for now
Take it like this
Looks good! Bon appetit
Why's this so good?
Really tasty
Seriously
It has a kick to it
Pork jowl now
Together with Jjapaghetti
Pork jowl Jjapaghetti
It's good!
Brisket on top too
Wrap it together like this
[Thumbs up]
Thank you
I'm salivating

-This is not normal -Extraordinary
How long was I here for?
10 servings in 1 hour and 10 minutes
That's a world record
This is cooked so well
[On her 6th bottle of Coca-Cola...]
[Accomplished]
[Applause]
-You're supposed to enjoy it -I enjoyed it very much
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
